questionHtml:
The shortest distance, in kilometres, between any two towns is given in the table.

Write down the total weight of the minimum spanning tree.
markschemeHtml:
24 (km)          A1

Note: FT from their sketch, only if it is a spanning tree. It is not required to see the edge lengths on the sketch, since they are given in the question.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Write down the total weight of the minimum spanning tree.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 3.16—Tree and cycle algorithms, Chinese postman, travelling salesman
